title: Arc Raiders
description: A faithful implementation of Arc Raiders' entities, items, and more into Minecraft.
body:
![The Arc Raiders logo, in a pixelated style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d014ea341781e19baf1ec89acee2f745db52c0b.png)

A faithful implementation of Arc Raiders' entities, items, armour, and more into Minecraft. Fight dangerous mobs, players, loot up, and more in this mod.

ENEMIES:
- Fight iconic Arc Raiders enemies!
- Currently includes: Wasps, Hornets, Snitches, Shredders, Pops, Leapers, Bastions, and Rocketeers, all with intricate AI, hitboxes, and more!

![The Arc Raiders Wasp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c14f95a933acc5b8b5181d2c23c4f2ee013afbf9.webp)

ARMOUR:
- Gear up with 6 iconic Arc Raiders equipment sets, all individually dyeable.

![6 Arc Raiders armours, added to Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27e756df4cab450848b6a846d01fa134de3cbb61.webp)

- Use special armour repair kits to repair your equipment.

![A crafting recipe with a helmet and repair kit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e3f46f1cbfe750d8eb80e484f207d73a28e391a.png)

ITEMS
- Collect and craft with 60+ custom items!

![60 custom items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceda6b36af1aa92a7ac2d8c65a681732b160e8ac.png)

COMBAT
- Fight other raiders and upgrade your raider tag as you get kills!

![5 Raider Tag Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1031264b009385a6f8b6eb46201bddbbc003f068.png)

- Stay wary of your friends and foes with raider flares, which shoot up into the sky when a player is killed or downed.

![A bright red flare with a smoke trail shooting up into the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4639be9d91175f5a2b3003d8160b19d2ae1976.png)

GUNS
- Boasting 14 iconic guns from Arc Raiders, lock and load with the unique weapons in this mod. Take the fight to the Arc - or each other.

![14 custom guns added by the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97e5be4040102b42f6e006104527d80dfdf12aa1.png)
![The torrente LMG from Arc Raiders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5581ade8501fa4b4f4d41c49b4a74ad6af3e4387.png)
![The Osprey sniper rifle from Arc Raiders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8464e3263e2279aa68687523fdc4a19b4813aaf1.png)

===CREDITS===
This mod would not have been possible without the time and effort put in by many people.
- [TwoFaceEm](https://x.com/TwoFaceMZ): Entity models and item textures
- [Kenddie](https://www.curseforge.com/members/kenddie/projects): Armour models and textures
- Pankeko: Gun models
- [TheHarbinger69](https://www.curseforge.com/members/the_harbinger69/projects): Entity optimization
- SammieAurelia: Voicelines
- [Me](https://www.youtube.com/@ReddedOut): Development, design, (some) item/block models, sound design
- [Protagnst Media](https://www.youtube.com/@Protagnst): Sponsorship, design
